data.name: 菲拉娜與聖靈藥
data.detailed_description:
Philana and Lily have lived together peacefully in the mountains ever since Philana saved Lily's life. One day, she returns home to find Lily collapsed on the floor. Scattered around are rare and exotic ingredients, theoretical papers on synthesizing an Elixir, and other alchemy-related artifacts.

Surprised, Philana asks Lily what she's been doing, and Lily reveals that she's been battling an illness that can only be cured with the help of an Elixir. Unable to continue her search for the remaining ingredients, Philana offers to find them herself.

After Lily reluctantly accepts her offer, Philana sets out for a nearby town, intending to use it as a base of operations from which she can gather information on the remaining ingredients.

Will Philana be able to find what Lily needs? And what's with the mysterious group that's seeking the same items?

It's up to you to find out!

In this traditional turn-based RPG, you'll make your way through a variety of locations where the ingredients you seek can be found.

Level up and learn new skills to topple enemies. Philana is quite the adept sorcerer, and the skills she'll learn on her journey pack quite the punch.

Depending on the amount of times you're defeated, you'll get a different ending. Try to find them all!

Exploration-Filled RPG

Navigate the wide-open areas around town. Each zone is unique and features a multitude of enemies to fight.

Exciting Quests

The town's citizens live peaceful lives, but that doesn't change the fact that they need help. There are several side tasks you can complete, all of which will net you various rewards!

Deep and Enriching Story

There's more than meets the eye to Philana, Lily, and their respective families. They both have complex pasts, and it's up to you to uncover them!

data.short_description: Philana sets off on a journey at the request of her friend Lily to find the exotic ingredients necessary to synthesize an illness-curing Elixir. Unfortunately for Philana, she's not the only one searching for those ingredients. Will she be able to successfully retrieve them for Lily?
data.supported_languages: 英文, 日文, 簡體中文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: Intel Core2 Duo or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows® 7/8/8.1/10
  • 處理器: 2+ GHz Processor
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL ES 2.0 hardware driver support required for WebGL acceleration. (AMD Catalyst 10.9, nVidia 358.50)
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 4 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: 1280x768 or better Display. Lag may occur from loading menus or maps. Turn off other programs before running the game.
